vocab.sentence: Ted went to the Halloween party in a Super Mario costume.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ted 穿著超級瑪利歐的服裝去參加萬聖節派對。

vocab.sentence: The girl is known for her language ability.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個女孩以她的語言才能而聞名。

vocab.sentence: This scooter is amazing. It only has one weakness—it is too heavy for me.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這台機車很棒，它只有一個缺點——對我來說太重了。

vocab.sentence: Ann seldom talks about her personal life, so we know very little about her.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ann 很少談論她的私人生活，所以我們對她了解得很少。

vocab.sentence: It is normal to feel sad when his pet dies.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 當他的寵物死去時感到難過是正常的。

vocab.sentence: After the pop star was murdered, all of his fans cried over his death.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位流行歌手被謀殺後，他所有的粉絲都為他的死亡而哭泣。

vocab.sentence: Gina just broke up with her boyfriend, and she was very depressed about it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Gina 剛剛和她的男友分手，她對此感到非常沮喪。

vocab.sentence: Today, computer crime is a big problem.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如今，電腦犯罪是一個大問題。

vocab.sentence: Ben sent a long message to Jane in anger because she forgot about their date.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ben 因為 Jane 忘記了他們的約會而憤怒地發了一封長訊息給她。

vocab.sentence: My brother wore a mask to protect himself from the dirty air.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我的哥哥戴著口罩來保護自己免受髒空氣侵害。

vocab.sentence: Celine changed to a different phone case to provide better protection for her smartphone.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Celine 換了一個不同的手機殼，為她的智慧型手機提供更好的保護。

vocab.sentence: I had a lovely blanket in my childhood, but it is gone now.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我童年時有一條可愛的毯子，但現在它已不見了。

vocab.sentence: There are fewer female taxi drivers than male ones.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 女性計程車司機比男性少。

vocab.sentence: Many people respect Jam Hsiao for his acts of kindness.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多人因蕭敬騰的善舉而尊敬他。

vocab.sentence: Mike is not good at hiding his emotions.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Mike 不擅長隱藏他的情緒。

vocab.sentence: Going to bed late has a negative effect on the human body.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 晚睡對人體有負面影響。

phrases.sentence: Believe it or not, cats cannot taste sweet things.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 信不信由你，貓無法嚐到甜味。

phrases.sentence: Although Maggie was sad about her breakup, she soon got over it.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 雖然 Maggie 對她的分手感到難過，但她很快就從中恢復了。

phrases.sentence: The producer made the baker's story into a TV drama.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那位製作人把麵包師傅的故事改編成電視劇。

phrases.sentence: Joanne doesn't know how to deal with the noise that her neighbors make.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Joanne 不知道如何應付她鄰居發出的噪音。

tips.label: 關係子句 — 受格用法
such...that... 句型
tips.text: S + V + such (+ a/an) + Adj + N + that 子句

notes.title: 關係子句 — 受格用法
notes.description: 當關係代名詞在子句中擔任受格時，常可省略。人用 whom；物/動物用 which；人/物/動物皆可用 that。
examples: The song that Nick is singing was written by himself.

notes.title: such...that... 句型
notes.rule: S + V + such (+ a/an) + Adj + N + that 子句
notes.description: 意為「如此...以至於...」。such 後面接「形容詞 + 名詞」，that 子句表示結果。
examples: It is such a personal question that I don't want to answer it.

quiz.question: The costume ________ the actor wore was very expensive.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (costume)，關代作為 wore 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a normal day that I just want to stay at home.
quiz.hint: normal day 為名詞片語，符合 such a + Adj + N + that 結構。

quiz.question: The ability ________ the girl showed surprised everyone.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (ability)，關代作為 showed 的受格。

quiz.question: He has ________ a negative emotion that he cannot sleep at night.
quiz.hint: negative emotion 為名詞片語，應選 such。

quiz.question: The female teacher ________ all the students respect is Miss Lin.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人，關代作為 respect 的受格。

quiz.question: Believe it or not, the crime ________ the man committed was for his family.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (crime)，關代作為 committed 的受格。

quiz.question: It was ________ a terrible murder that no one dared to talk about it.
quiz.hint: murder 為名詞，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The personal problems ________ Mike is dealing with are very complex.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物，關代作為 dealing with 的受格。

quiz.question: Gina felt ________ depressed that she didn't want to eat anything.
quiz.hint: depressed 為形容詞，前面接 so。

quiz.question: The protection ________ the mask provides is very important.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (protection)，關代作為 provides 的受格。

quiz.question: This is ________ a weakness that he needs to get over it quickly.
quiz.hint: weakness 為名詞，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The emotions ________ the movie made into a story were very touching.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (emotions)，關代作為 made 的受格。

quiz.question: The childhood memory ________ Ted treasures is about his grandfather.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (memory)，關代作為 treasures 的受格。

quiz.question: It was ________ anger that Ben couldn't say a word.
quiz.hint: anger 為不可數名詞，後面接 that，故選 such。

quiz.question: The female doctor ________ we saw yesterday is very famous.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人 (doctor)，關代作為 saw 的受格。

quiz.question: The negative effect ________ smoking has on health is well-known.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (negative effect)，關代作為 has 的受格。

quiz.question: Ann is ________ an emotional person that she cries easily.
quiz.hint: emotional person 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The personal life ________ the star wants to protect is not for the public.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (personal life)，關代作為 protect 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a simple ability that anyone can learn it.
quiz.hint: ability 為名詞，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The murder ________ the police are investigating happened last night.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (murder)，關代作為 investigating 的受格。

quiz.question: Ted was in ________ anger that he broke the chair.
quiz.hint: anger 為不可數名詞，此處為「such + N + that」結構。

quiz.question: The costume ________ I bought for the party is too small.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (costume)，關代作為 bought 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a normal reaction that you don't need to worry.
quiz.hint: normal reaction 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The weakness ________ the team has is their slow speed.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (weakness)，關代作為 has 的受格。

quiz.question: The female student ________ I respect most is very hardworking.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人 (student)，關代作為 respect 的受格。

quiz.question: The ability ________ Ted has in languages is very impressive.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (ability)，關代作為 has 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a normal day that I just want to stay at home.
quiz.hint: normal day 為名詞片語，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The crime ________ the man committed was very serious.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (crime)，關代作為 committed 的受格。

quiz.question: He is ________ an emotional person that he cried during the movie.
quiz.hint: emotional person 為名詞片語，前面接 such。

quiz.question: The protection ________ the helmet provides is for your safety.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (protection)，關代作為 provides 的受格。

quiz.question: Believe it or not, it is ________ a hard problem that I can't deal with it.
quiz.hint: hard problem 為名詞片語，符合 such...that 結構。

quiz.question: The female writer ________ everyone respects is very humble.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人 (writer)，關代作為 respects 的受格。

quiz.question: The negative effect ________ the news had on her was huge.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (negative effect)，關代作為 had 的受格。

quiz.question: It was ________ a personal matter that I didn't want to tell anyone.
quiz.hint: personal matter 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The emotions ________ the boy expressed in his poem were deep.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (emotions)，關代作為 expressed 的受格。

quiz.question: Gina is dealing with ________ a depressed mood that she needs a break.
quiz.hint: depressed mood 為名詞片語，故選 such。

quiz.question: The weakness ________ the scooter has is its weight.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (weakness)，關代作為 has 的受格。

quiz.question: The female doctor ________ we met last week is very kind.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人，關代作為 met 的受格。

quiz.question: It is ________ a normal feeling that you shouldn't be ashamed.
quiz.hint: normal feeling 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The childhood friend ________ I haven't seen for years called me today.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為人 (friend)，關代作為 seen 的受格。

quiz.question: The anger ________ Ben showed yesterday was scary.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為不可數名詞 (anger)，關代作為 showed 的受格。

quiz.question: It was ________ a loud noise that everyone looked at the door.
quiz.hint: loud noise 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The murder ________ the movie is based on was a real story.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (murder)，關代作為 based on 的受格。

quiz.question: He has ________ a great ability that he can speak five languages.
quiz.hint: ability 為名詞，使用 such...that 句型。

quiz.question: The personal information ________ the app collected was stolen.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (information)，關代作為 collected 的受格。

quiz.question: She is ________ a famous female singer that everyone knows her.
quiz.hint: female singer 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The costume ________ my mother made for me was beautiful.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (costume)，選 which。

quiz.question: It is ________ a negative thing that we should not talk about it.
quiz.hint: negative thing 為名詞片語，選 such。

quiz.question: The emotions ________ Mike feels are difficult to get over.
quiz.hint: 先行詞為物 (emotions)，關代作為 feels 的受格。

quiz.question: Believe it or not, he has ________ a good heart that he helps everyone.
quiz.hint: good heart 為名詞片語，符合 such...that。

vocab.sentence: Ted went to the Halloween party in a Super Mario costume.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ted 穿著超級瑪利歐的服裝去參加萬聖節派對。

vocab.sentence: The girl is known for her language ability.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個女孩以她的語言才能而聞名。

vocab.sentence: This scooter is amazing. It only has one weakness—it is too heavy for me.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這台機車很棒，它只有一個缺點——對我來說太重了。

vocab.sentence: Ann seldom talks about her personal life, so we know very little about her.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ann 很少談論她的私人生活，所以我們對她了解得很少。

vocab.sentence: It is normal to feel sad when his pet dies.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 當他的寵物死去時感到難過是正常的。

vocab.sentence: After the pop star was murdered, all of his fans cried over his death.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位流行歌手被謀殺後，他所有的粉絲都為他的死亡而哭泣。

vocab.sentence: Gina just broke up with her boyfriend, and she was very depressed about it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Gina 剛剛和她的男友分手，她對此感到非常沮喪。

vocab.sentence: Diane always stays positive. Almost nothing can depress her.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Diane 總是保持正面。幾乎沒有任何事情能讓她沮喪。

vocab.sentence: Today, computer crime is a big problem.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如今，電腦犯罪是一個大問題。

vocab.sentence: Ben sent a long message to Jane in anger because she forgot about their date.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Ben 因為 Jane 忘記了他們的約會而憤怒地發了一封長訊息給她。

vocab.sentence: My brother wore a mask to protect himself from the dirty air.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我的哥哥戴著口罩來保護自己免受髒空氣侵害。

vocab.sentence: Celine changed to a different phone case to provide better protection for her smartphone.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Celine 換了一個不同的手機殼，為她的智慧型手機提供更好的保護。

vocab.sentence: I had a lovely blanket in my childhood, but it is gone now.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我童年時有一條可愛的毯子，但現在它已不見了。

vocab.sentence: There are fewer female taxi drivers than male ones.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 女性計程車司機比男性少。

vocab.sentence: This toilet is only for females. Men are not allowed to use it.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這個廁所僅供女性使用，男性不得使用。

vocab.sentence: Many people respect Jam Hsiao for his acts of kindness.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 許多人因蕭敬騰的善舉而尊敬他。

vocab.sentence: The team leader worked hard and earned the respect of the whole team.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那位隊長努力工作，贏得了整個團隊的尊重。

vocab.sentence: Mike is not good at hiding his emotions.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Mike 不擅長隱藏他的情緒。

vocab.sentence: If we can meet our emotional needs, we can lead a happier life.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果我們能滿足情感上的需求，我們就能過上更幸福的生活。

vocab.sentence: Going to bed late has a negative effect on the human body.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 晚睡對人體有負面影響。

phrases.sentence: Believe it or not, cats cannot taste sweet things.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 信不信由你，貓無法嚐到甜味。

phrases.sentence: Although Maggie was sad about her breakup, she soon got over it.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 雖然 Maggie 對她的分手感到難過，但她很快就從中恢復了。

phrases.sentence: The producer made the baker's story into a TV drama.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 那位製作人把麵包師傅的故事改編成電視劇。

phrases.sentence: Joanne doesn't know how to deal with the noise that her neighbors make.
phrases.sentence_chinese: Joanne 不知道如何應付她鄰居發出的噪音。

grammar.sentence: The costume which Ted wore was very cool.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Ted 穿的那套服裝非常酷。

grammar.sentence: It is such a personal question that I cannot answer.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這是如此私人的問題以至於我無法回答。

grammar.sentence: The ability that the girl has is very special.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那位女孩擁有的才能非常特別。

grammar.sentence: It was such a deep weakness that he felt sad.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此深處的弱點以至於他感到難過。

grammar.sentence: The female leader whom the people respect is very kind.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 人們尊敬的那位女性領導者非常仁慈。

grammar.sentence: Believe it or not, the crime that he committed was a mistake.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 信不信由你，他所犯下的罪行是一個錯誤。

grammar.sentence: It was such a terrible murder that everyone was afraid.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此可怕的謀殺案以至於每個人都害怕。

grammar.sentence: The personal life that the star has is very busy.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那位明星擁有的私人生活非常忙碌。

grammar.sentence: It is such a normal day that nothing special happened.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這是如此平凡的一天以至於沒有什麼特別的事發生。

grammar.sentence: The anger that Ben felt was very strong.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Ben 感受到的憤怒非常強烈。

grammar.sentence: It was such a great protection that the phone survived.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此棒的保護以至於手機倖存了下來。

grammar.sentence: The childhood memories which I treasure are about my dog.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我珍藏的那段童年回憶是關於我的狗。

grammar.sentence: It was such an emotional movie that many people cried.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此感人的電影以至於許多人都哭了。

grammar.sentence: The negative emotions that Mike is dealing with are hard.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Mike 正在處理的那些負面情緒很艱難。

grammar.sentence: The female student whom the teacher praised is very smart.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 老師讚美的那位女學生非常聰明。

grammar.sentence: The normal life that I live is simple and happy.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我過的一般生活簡單且快樂。

grammar.sentence: It is such a heavy scooter that I cannot move it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 它是如此重的一台機車以至於我搬不動它。

grammar.sentence: The anger which Ted showed made everyone scared.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Ted 表現出的憤怒讓每個人都感到害怕。

grammar.sentence: It was such a difficult crime that the police couldn't solve it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是一樁如此困難的罪行以至於警察無法解決它。

grammar.sentence: The female doctor whom we visited is very professional.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我們拜訪的那位女醫生非常專業。

grammar.sentence: It is such a negative effect that we must avoid it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這是如此負面的影響以至於我們必須避免它。

grammar.sentence: The personal reasons that she gave were not true.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她給出的那些個人理由並非真實。

grammar.sentence: It was such a lovely childhood that I will never forget it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此美好的童年以至於我永遠不會忘記。

grammar.sentence: The emotions that Mike is hiding are very deep.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Mike 正在隱藏的情緒非常深。

grammar.sentence: It was such a funny costume that everyone laughed.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此滑稽的服裝以至於每個人都笑了。

grammar.sentence: The ability which you have will help you in the future.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你擁有的才能在未來會對你有幫助。

grammar.sentence: It is such a serious murder that it is on the news.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此嚴重的謀殺案以至於上了新聞。

grammar.sentence: The female students whom I teach are very smart.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我教的那些女學生非常聰明。

grammar.sentence: It was such a bad weakness that the team lost.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 那是如此糟糕的弱點以至於隊伍輸了。

grammar.sentence: The protection which this case provides is very good.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個殼提供的保護非常好。
